23.reason: [scanf with %c reads every character including newlines; the loop does not stop at '=', it continues until EOF. The problem states input ends with '=', so the loop should break upon reading '='. Continuing past '=' may read unintended characters or hang waiting for EOF.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.14285714285714285 , reason:  [Loop does not stop at '=', continues reading beyond '=' which may cause incorrect parsing or infinite loop if input doesn't end with EOF immediately after '=']
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.14285714285714285 , reason:  [Incorrect loop termination: the input ends with '=', not EOF; this causes the loop to wait indefinitely or process beyond '=']
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 0.14285714285714285 , reason:  [Loop does not stop at '=', continues reading until EOF which may not occur in expected input format]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 0.2 , reason:  [scanf with %c reads every character including newlines; the loop does not stop at '=', it continues until EOF.
